name: Cinematic Photo
description: Atmospheric cinematic photography with dramatic composition and lighting.
prompt_prefix: cinematic photography, dramatic composition, atmospheric scene, realistic lighting, cinematic color grading
prompt_suffix: highly detailed, sharp focus, volumetric lighting, realistic textures, film still
negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, flat lighting, oversaturated, cartoon, anime, illustration, deformed anatomy, malformed hands, extra fingers, duplicated objects, watermark, text, logo
